name: Badlee
overview: Education in rural areas has played a very important role in Nation's progress. Set on the backdrop of a rural area, this eight-part web series revolves around a teacher from a city who comes to a village to take up the challenge to educate the rural children.

trailers.title: Badlee [Trailer] 'बदली' | Planet Marathi Originals | Akshay Bardapurkar | Planet Marathi OTT
